name: Italian Frittata
instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C). Grease a shallow baking dish with cooking spray or butter.

2. Heat the Olive Oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the Salami, drained and chopped Canned Artichokes, halved Cherry Tomatoes, and sliced Button Mushrooms. Cook and stir until everything is heated through and the vegetables begin to soften, about 4 minutes. Transfer the salami and vegetable mixture to the prepared baking dish, spreading it evenly.

3. In a large bowl, whisk together the Eggs, Milk, chopped Scallions, minced Garlic, Dried Basil, Onion Powder, Salt, and Black Pepper until well combined and slightly frothy. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the salami and vegetables in the baking dish.

4. Sprinkle the shredded Mozzarella and grated Parmesan cheeses evenly over the top, covering the entire surface.

5. Bake in the preheated oven until the eggs are completely set in the center and the cheese is melted and lightly golden, about 20 minutes. A knife inserted in the center should come out clean. Let rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
simpleInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F and grease a shallow baking dish.

2. Heat Olive Oil and cook Salami with chopped Canned Artichokes, halved Cherry Tomatoes, and sliced Button Mushrooms until heated through. Transfer to baking dish.

3. Whisk Eggs with Milk, chopped Scallions, minced Garlic, and all seasonings. Pour over the salami mixture.

4. Top with Mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses and bake for 20 minutes until set.
